zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：弱势震荡下行格局
zh.content:
当前价格运行在7.02附近，位于20日均线7.27下方，整体趋势偏空。短期结构显示高点逐步下移，买盘动能不足，市场处于弱势震荡下行阶段，尚未出现明确反转信号。

MACD指标维持负值并持续下行，空头动能仍占优势，短线反弹力度有限。SMA20下压价格，说明中期趋势仍偏弱，若无法快速站上均线，行情将继续承压。

下方关键支撑位关注6.98低点，一旦跌破可能下探6.80区域。上方阻力位在7.11及7.27均线附近，突破需放量确认，否则反弹仍以弱势修复为主。

操作上建议以逢高做空或区间交易为主，严格控制仓位与止损。若价格反抽至7.10-7.20区间可考虑分批布局空单，跌破支撑后顺势跟进更稳健。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD remains under modest bearish pressure, with the latest price at 7.02 trading below the 20-period simple moving average of 7.27. The inability to reclaim the SMA suggests sellers continue to control short-term momentum, while the 24-hour decline of 0.66% reinforces a cautious market tone. Price action has also remained confined near the lower end of the recent trading range, indicating limited buying conviction and a lack of strong upside catalysts in the immediate term.

Momentum indicators currently favor the downside. The MACD reading of -0.197 indicates bearish momentum remains active, although the absence of a signal-line value limits confirmation of potential trend shifts. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess whether AVAX is approaching oversold conditions. Nevertheless, the combination of a negative MACD and price trading below its moving average points to a market that is still struggling to establish a sustainable recovery.

Key technical levels are becoming increasingly important. Immediate support is located near the session low around 6.98, with a break below this area potentially exposing the psychologically significant 6.90 zone. On the upside, resistance is first seen near 7.11, corresponding closely to the recent high. A stronger resistance region sits around the 20-day SMA at 7.27, where sellers may re-emerge if price attempts a rebound. A decisive move above that level would improve the short-term outlook.

From a trading perspective, conservative participants may prefer to wait for confirmation of strength above 7.11 and ideally above 7.27 before considering bullish positions. More aggressive traders could monitor support near 6.98 for short-term bounce opportunities, while maintaining disciplined risk management. If AVAX fails to hold current support, downside momentum could accelerate, making protective stop placement essential in the current market environment.
